code:
import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if not list.contains(nums, n)
        mut sorted: List<Int> = []
        mut inserted = false
        mut j = 0
        while j < list.len(nums)
          match list.get(nums, j)
          when Some(v)
            if not inserted and n < v
              sorted = list.push(sorted, n)
              inserted = true
            end
            sorted = list.push(sorted, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          j = j + 1
        end
        if not inserted
          sorted = list.push(sorted, n)
        end
        nums = sorted
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < list.len(nums)
  match list.get(nums, k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
